title: oogiebear 360° Toothbrush - Training Toothbrush for Babies. Safe Ultra Soft Silicone Toothbrush with Teddy Bear Baby Gum Relief and Gum Massaging Base. Baby Must Haves. BPA Free
features: MAKES BRUSHING SAFE AND BEAR-ABLE - oogiebear’s adorable and innovative baby toothbrush provides better baby oral care and makes brushing tiny teeth fun with a soft bristle brush and bear head design that ensures it never goes in too deep.

FUN AND FUNCTIONAL DESIGN - oogiebear’s unique 360 degree toothbrush effectively cleans teeth and gums with short soft bristles. The soft silicone base is easy for baby to hold while premium grade silicone bumps stimulate gums.

BABY’S FIRST TOOTHBRUSH - Made for babies 3 months and older, oogiebear toothbrush is the perfect tool to get your baby used to brushing before graduating to their first big-kid toothbrush. Its stand-up base makes it easy to clean and store.

SUPERIOR QUALITY - oogiebear toothbrush is made with the highest quality food-grade silicone. Its extra-soft bristles are fun to chew and won’t break off or cause choking while its base has a silky touch that’s soothing to gums.

DOCTOR DESIGNED, MOM TESTED, PERIODONTIST APPROVED - Created by a registered pharmacist and mother and periodontist dad, oogiebear toothbrush is designed to make learning to brush easier for parents and baby for a lifetime of bright beautiful smiles.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

description: Preserve toothbrush in travel case 6-pk, soft bristle Preserve consulted closely with dental professionals to create a toothbrush that gets your teeth cleaner but minimizes your impact on the environment. The reusable, clear travel case features ventilation holes and a cap to keep your toothbrush clean and dry wherever you take it or store it. reviews.title: Great value for the money sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Great adult sonic toothbrush for a nice value. One thing to note is this vibrates rather than spins. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. Regardless, I enjoy using it. It comes with 6 replacement heads for a 18 month supply, which is pretty impressive. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. 60+ day charge. Nice black color. Easy to use & charge. Great value for the money.

Amazon will donate to your favorite charity! Use Amazon Smile (smile.amazon.com) when you order and Amazon will donate to the charity of your choice when you make a qualifying purchase. Check out how Amazon Smile works at https://smile.amazon.com/gp/chpf/about/ref=smi_se_rspo_laas_aas. My shopping is donating to my charity of choice; Unravel, at no cost to me! Unravel is a nonprofit organization working to spread knowledge about the grim realities of pediatric cancer and the devastating impact from the lack of funding. All monies raised by and for Unravel will go directly to the fight against pediatric cancer.

reviews.title: Attractive yellow color!
reviews.text: First of all, I love this bright yellow colored electric toothbrush! A refreshing change from the regular black and  white sonic electric toothbrushes that are on the market right now! The bristles are ordinary but the extra brush heads make up for it. The price is just the same like the regular sonic brushes right now so it is worth a try!

reviews.title: Strong Vibration
reviews.text: Works well with strong vibration. Timer works well with 30 seconds intervals. Brushes well with soft bristles. The only thing that I personally don't like is the slippery handle. Otherwise it is a good product. Shipping was fast.

reviews.title: The Yellow is Very Cheerful
reviews.text: This is a nice electric toothbrush for the price. It has multiple settings (clean, soft, polish, massage, and white), although I tend to leave it on white most of the time. The sunny yellow color is really quite cheerful and is a bright start to the day. The bristles are softer than others I've used, which is nice for those of us who tend to brush too hard. I really like that the brush head (and even the bristles) match the body... all in the same sunny yellow. I'm also impressed that it came with so many replacement brush heads, each with their own cover. I won't need to buy replacements for a long time! I'm pretty impressed overall.

reviews.title: Really Like It!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is sleek and powerful and I really like all of the different settings. It has a good battery life - I have only had to charge it twice so far.

reviews.title: Good water flosser
reviews.text:
I got this because my last water flosser has such a tiny water reservoir I don’t bother using it. I bought this one because of the larger water reservoir.

The first time I went to use it I was ready to give it 1 star. It was terrible. No water came out and my troubleshooting efforts left me nothing but frustrated. I tossed it back in the box to try again when I was less annoyed.

Then I tried again and love it. I don’t know what worked differently, but it’s worked well since the first time. Maybe it needed to get cursed at a few times to warm up. The flosser has different settings so you can pick what’s right for you. I liked the pulse setting because it seemed to leave me with less of that annoying water flosser spray that seems inevitable no matter how careful I am.

I didn’t love the toothbrush, and the water+toothbrush setting just seemed to be a mess with no actual flossing effect. I don’t intend to use this for brushing, but it will definitely replace my old water flosser.

reviews.title: A good deal having an electric toothbrush and flosser in one!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5025a1cf3fd1dd9c157cb4eefde50d23]] If you can't have regular visits to the dentist, you may try this product! It is a toothbrush and flosser in one which is a good deal! It was messy on my first try as shown on the attached pic! I used the external water for the flosser and wasn't able to properly attached the flosser. I finally was able to  manage it on my subsequent attempts.  Although you can choose the different modes of output, the pressure of the water is a bit strong. I'm not sure if you can adjust the pressure. If you have sensitive gums or teeth, expect a little bleeding. Overall, this  is a great home product which I recommend!

reviews.title: WOW!
reviews.text: Nice combination. I've used the oral b, water pik and now this one. Its messy and the brush flosser isn't the hottest. By itself ok. If you disconnect the water line, plan on water everywhere. I prefer, the water pik and this brush. No fuss, no mess. Rechargeable is a plus. Looks to last a long time. Sonic vibrations are the bomb. Depending on your teeth, sonic is great. Not going back to oral b, sonic is much better. As a stand alone brush its great and worth the money for that alone.

reviews.title: Brush brush brush your teeth.
reviews.text: I've never owned a electric toothbrush so I wasn't sure what to expect. But after I received the unit I'm not sure how I survived without it. An electric toothbrush makes the tedious job of brushing your teeth a lot easier. The unit has numinous settings to (my favorite is pulse) allow you to select the best for your style of brushing. The head is relatively small so it can get all the way to your back teeth with ease. The real bonus is the water flosser feature. The first time tried it I ended up spraying the mirror and getting water everywhere since. Once i got the hang of it it felt good to use it in conjunction with he brush.  At first I couldn't figure out with the additional hose set was for. So I went back to the instructions and realized that it was for those times when I was out of my house so I could water floss.

reviews.title: Good combination but not executed well
reviews.text:
I have a sonic toothbrush that I love. I also have a water flosser that I love. I thought the idea of combining the two was genius. It made perfect sense to have a device that flushes out the spaces between your teeth while you brush. Unfortunately, while this model combines the two functions, it doesn't do either function as well as the individual devices do on their own. The vibrating toothbrush function is ok but not great. The water flosser doesn't feel like it has the same power or precision (even on the highest setting) as my stand alone water flosser. Also, the hose that connects the water flosser to the brush kinks very easily (especially if you use anything but warm water) so it's difficult to maneuver around your mouth without it stopping because the hose bent too much.
If I had never owned a vibrating toothbrush or a water flosser before I might think this was an awesome device but I was really hoping for more.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.
features: You will receive 1 Oral-B Pulsar battery toothbrush with charcoal infused bristles, battery included
The Charcoal infused bristles gently vibrate to effectively clean plaque and remove surface stains for whiter teeth
Penetrates deep between teeth and hard-to-reach areas of the mouth to sweep away plaque and stains caused by Food
Adjusts to the contours of your teeth and moderates the pressure applied to your teeth and gums
Oral-B is the #1 dentist-recommended toothbrush brand worldwide

reviews.title: Hello OralB
reviews.text: It’s an Oral-B.  I prefer this brand and hopped on the charcoal type at the advice of my former dentist.  She recommended.

reviews.title: Weak vibration
reviews.text: Not the best

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.

title: Sensodyne Pronamel Medium Toothbrush, Provides Tooth Enamel Protection and Cleans Better with Less Pressure - 4 Count
description: Sensodyne Pronamel Medium Toothbrush is specially designed for tooth enamel care and teeth protection. This medium bristle toothbrush cleans better with less pressure (1). Featuring a DuoFlex neck, this toothbrush is specially designed to protect against overbrushing and prevent enamel loss. This Sensodyne toothbrush pack contains a total of four toothbrushes, giving you plenty to stock your bathroom, travel kit and more with oral care products. It is recommended that toothbrushes are replaced every 3 months. For optimal enamel protection, brush twice daily using a Sensodyne Pronamel toothbrush and toothpaste. (1) In laboratory tests compared to a standard flat-trim toothbrush.
features: Two Packs of 2 Sensodyne Pronamel Tooth Enamel Protection Medium Toothbrush for Sensitive Teeth
Medium toothbrushes for adults offer better cleaning with less pressure (1)
Adult toothbrush features a DuoFlex neck to protect against overbrushing and prevent enamel loss
Convenient manual medium toothbrush pack comes with a total of four toothbrushes to keep you stocked
Manual toothbrush packaging is 100 percent recyclable for easy disposal
Use this tooth enamel toothbrush with Sensodyne toothpaste twice daily

reviews.title: Great for hard brushers
reviews.text: I tend to brush pretty hard and my gums do not appreciate that. These are soft enough that if I get over zealous my gums don't complain but my teeth still get clean.

reviews.title: Feel-Good Brush
reviews.text: I like that it cleans well.  I don't like that the brush bends away from the handle.

reviews.title: Bought for guest bath.
reviews.text: These are for guest bath. Just in case guests forget their toothbrush

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.

reviews.title: Doesn’t even work
reviews.text: It doesn’t come with a battery, which is fine - except it’s very difficult to get a battery in. The opening isn’t big enough and you have to shove it in there. It feels like you’re going to break something. Then i turned it on and it didn’t even work ….. so this is useless. So i will be returning it.

reviews.title: Cheap, broken in 1 week
reviews.text: Bristles are just glued on and came off in a week. Item is cheaply made in general. Would not recommend, wish I could get my money back.

reviews.title: It vibrates and nothing more
reviews.text: It says electric toothbrush and requires batteries but all it does is vibrate. I suppose a toddler doesn’t need an electric toothbrush. Just letting anyone reading this know all it does is vibrate.

title: Travel Toothbrush Cup, Multifunction Capsule Shape Wash Gargle Cup Portable Business Trips Travel Toothpaste Case Toothbrush Holder Organizer Box
description:
Material:
Made of high-quality food-grade ABS
Why we choose it?
- The transparent cup ensures contents clearly visible and easy to access. - Excellent cold weather flexibility. - Ultraviolet stability-20 years service life as exposed membrane guaranteed. - Light, easy to spread into place. - Completely homogeneously bonded seams with no seam edge or flap. - Excellent tensile, tear and elongation mechanical properties to ensure a long service life.
Application Occasions: Home, Outdoor, Travel, camping, Office, School, etc.

Separable into Two - It is connected by an attachment ring and can be separated as two cups, each of them can hold 350ml water, well sealed.
Multifunctional - The cup is 8.27" height x 2.95'' diameter , can be used for toothbrush, toothpaste, towel or cosmetics storage at daily or traveling, suitable for travel for two.
Durable - It's sturdy and won't easily break after falling to the ground. And it's so lightweight that you can use the them as gargle cup or water cup.
Portable - This travel mug looks like capsule which is cute. Compact size makes it easy to travel with and doesn't take up storage room when on a bathroom counter.

reviews.title: Easy care. Holds full sized brush and toothpaste.
reviews.text: I take this everywhere. We travel a lot. So, it gets a lot of wear and tear and a little bit dirty. It’s so easy to clean, I just throw it in the dishwasher. Also love the fact that her holes a full sized toothbrush and toothpaste. Highly recommend.

reviews.text: I bought two of these for our trip to Italy. Stayed closed in our luggage and fit perfectly on the bathroom counter upon arrival. I was able to place a full size tube of toothpaste and full-size toothbrush.

title: BASHUO Kids Ultrasonic Electric Toothbrush, 6 Gear Speed Mode IPX7 for Sensitive Teeth 360° Oral Cleaning U Shaped Toothbrush for Children Toddler 2-7 Years Old (Pink)
features: 【KIDS ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH】U-Shaped Toothbrush for Kids adopts a cute cartoon design, has 6 different tooth brushing modes, scientifically shakes for 45 seconds, and protects the dental health of children aged 2-7. The silicone head design allows children to develop the correct way of brushing without manual adjustment, making brushing a habit for children and enjoying the fun of brushing.

【Material safety and security】U shaped soft silicone brush head, medical food-grade liquid silicone material is environmentally friendly and hygienic, transparent, odorless, tough and durable, and food-grade bristles will not hurt the gums.

【45° Ultrasonic Toothbrushes】The professional scientific design of kids electric toothbrush,We have passed tens of thousands of simulated dental cleaning tests: 45° brushing with LED cold blue light low-frequency wave cleaning, 45 seconds of smart scientific timing to care for the toddler's teeth. The Technique is safe to protect oral health by redox reaction with pigment.

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODES】Six different smart cleaning modes，Which can satisfy that all teeth are covered, sound waves clean teeth 5000-15000 times/min, different frequencies, diverse and powerful, care for oral health, clean stubborn tooth stains, whiten teeth, also suitable for sensitive gums, and promote around the gums Gum blood circulation. It is equipped with 400mAh battery, It can be used for 400 hours each time with USB charging once every half month. Perfect for daily use and travel.

【IPX7 waterproof】With IPX7 professional waterproof technology,Toddler can brush their teeth while bathing. USAGE TIPS - This toothbrush should be used with foam toothpaste. When brushing your teeth, please move left and right while adjusting the up and down angle to achieve the best cleaning effect. Replace the brushing head every 2-3 months to Keep the brush head in good condition. Keep the toothbrush body dry while charging and its working time should be less than 10 mins.

reviews.title: Great for little boys who don’t brush well
reviews.text: My son is horrible at brushing his teeth. He does it often, just has a hard time getting every crevice. He shakes this around back and fourth while in his mouth and gets them nice and clean. 10/10 would recommend.

title: Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults - 5 Powerful Cleaning & Whitening Modes with Soft Dupont Bristles, 2 Hours Quick Charge for 60 Days, IPX7 Waterproof Travel Portable Oral Dental Care Kit (Green)
features: 🦷【Smart Sonic Toothbrush】- Our electric toothbrush uses an ultra-powerful and industry-leading motor to drive the liquid between the teeth and deep into the gum line, effectively dissolving stains on the surface of the teeth. Provides superior cleaning by delivering soothing micro-pulses to improve gum health. Removes up to 10 times more plaque than a manual toothbrush, helps whiten teeth.

🦷【5 Modes Ultra Clean】- The sonic toothbrush has 5 vibration modes, clean (mild), white (strong), polish (strong inversion frequency), massage (mild inversion frequency) and sensitive (soft). You can choose stronger or lighter modes according to different oral and gum conditions. Get healthier gums, fresher breath and whiter teeth with this low-noise, lightweight sonic toothbrush.

🦷【Smart Timer Reminder】 - The electric toothbrush has a standard 2-minute brushing timer to ensure scientific brushing time. Pausing every 30 seconds to remind you to change and move on to the next brushing area, the smart toothbrush helps you develop good brushing habits. And the rechargeable toothbrush has an automatic memory function, which can record the mode used when it was turned off last time.

🦷【Large Battery Capacity, IPX7 Waterproof】- The long-life rechargeable toothbrush has a battery indicator light, has a low battery reminder and automatically cuts off the power when fully charged. The large battery capacity can be used for up to 60 days in just 2 hours with fast charging (2 times a day). The IPX7-rated fully sealed charging port is more secure and waterproof, and can be used in bathtubs and showers.

🦷【Gift Box Packaging Included】- Our electric toothbrush comes in a premium gift box packag. Includes 1 Sonic Electric Toothbrush, 2 DuPont Brush Heads, 1 Charging Cable, 1 Travel Case for Electric Toothbrush Handle and Brush Heads. You can also find detailed instructions and a support contact manual. Perfect as a gift for your family and friends.
🦷We provide you with 1 year warranty service. If you have any questions, please contact us first, we will provide you with satisfactory customer service within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Brush your teeth
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:3fb7df8324b736c48355f08468ae1f62]] You’ve got to brush those teeth. Make them all squeaky clean !

This seems like a standard electric toothbrush

I like the design and think it looks nice

It has a good feel to it overall and i thought the different settings were nice

reviews.title: Superior Brushing Experience
reviews.text: This electric toothbrush is the best I've ever used. It charged quickly and lasts. It is comfortable in my hands through the entire brushing process. It has average buzzing sound. There are multiple intensities of bruising power for different parts of my mouth. My teeth went from obvious coffee drinker to noticeably whiter and healthier. The bristles are gentle regardless of which setting I used. The narrow head allows me to easily brush my back teeth and gums.

reviews.title: Absolutly love this color
reviews.text: i have never had so many people fight over these!  great color and design!  never seen a green toothbrush and clearly noone else has either lol  works great!

title: CORATED Toddler Toothbrush U-Shaped Kids Toothbrush Baby Soft Silicone Toothbrush Manual Training Toothbrush Infant 360° Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Kids 2-7 Years Old (Doughnut Brown)
features: 【SAFETY MATERIAL】Different from ordinary toothbrushes, U-shaped toothbrushes use safe food-grade silicone material, which is soft and comfortable, has no peculiar smell, and without BPA. Mothers are more at ease to protect the baby's oral health.

【360° EFFECTIVE CLEANING】The unique U-shaped toothbrush head design is more suitable for Toddler's tooth structure. It fits each tooth perfectly and provides adequate cleaning and protection for your child's teeth.

【FUN&CUTE TOOTHBRUSH】The cute rainbow and doughnut patterns, and the creative U-shaped toothbrush make it easy and fun for children to brush their teeth. This helps your child be willing to brush their teeth longer and even develop healthy brushing habits, say goodbye to tooth decay.

【EXTRA SOFT TOOTHBRUSH】The silicone bristles is soft on children's teeth and gums, clean teeth gently and massage baby’s delicate gums. The Soft brush head help get into hard to reach areas and effectively and remove stains.

【EASY TO USE】Squeeze toothpaste on the both side of the baby's toothbrush and put the kids toothbrush into baby's mouth, Swing it left to right, in 60 seconds finished the brushing. This package comes with 1 silicone toothbrush and 1 replacement silicone brush head, it is recommended to replace the brush head every 1 month. Toothbrush size: 85mm/3.35", Brush head size: 1.96"*0.98". Specially designed for the teeth of toddlers aged 2-7.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!
